auth.login.title: Sign in
auth.login.subtitle: Use the email your course or school uses. SSO options appear when your organization connects them.
auth.login.ssoAria: Log in with institutional single sign-on
auth.login.serverUnreachable: Could not reach the server. Is the API running?
auth.login.orgNotFound: This organization sign-in address was not found.
auth.signup.title: Create your account
auth.signup.subtitle: One account for courses, assignments, and messages. If your school uses SSO, you can sign in that way later.
auth.signup.registerAsParent: I am registering as a parent or guardian for read-only access when my school links my account to a student.
